name: Blueberry Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the blueberries and crush 1 cup of them, reserving the rest.
2. Blend together the sugar and cornstarch in a bowl.
3. Add the crushed berries and water to the sugar and cornstarch mixture, stirring constantly until it thickens and bubbles.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the lemon juice and reserved whole berries.
5. Pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar one tablespoon at a time, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread the meringue over the hot filling, pressing it against the inner edge of the crust to seal.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes or until the meringue is lightly browned.
